text:
@if type-of($gutter) == "list"
    @if length($gutter) == 2
      $gt: sassyAutoGutterFallback(nth($gutter, 1), $sgv) / 2
      $gr: sassyAutoGutterFallback(nth($gutter, 2), $sgh) / 2
      $gb: $gt
      $gl: $gr
    @else if length($gutter) == 4
      $gt: sassyAutoGutterFallback(nth($gutter, 1), $sgv) / 2
      $gr: sassyAutoGutterFallback(nth($gutter, 2), $sgh) / 2
      $gb: sassyAutoGutterFallback(nth($gutter, 3), $sgv) / 2
      $gl: sassyAutoGutterFallback(nth($gutter, 4), $sgh) / 2

@else
      @if length($gutter) == 2
        $gt: sassyAutoGutterFallback(nth($gutter, 1), $sgv) * 0.5
        $gr: sassyAutoGutterFallback(nth($gutter, 2), $sgh) * 0.5
        $gb: $gt
        $gl: $gr
      @else if length($gutter) == 4
        $gt: sassyAutoGutterFallback(nth($gutter, 1), $sgv) * 0.5
        $gr: sassyAutoGutterFallback(nth($gutter, 2), $sgh) * 0.5
        $gb: sassyAutoGutterFallback(nth($gutter, 3), $sgv) * 0.5
        $gl: sassyAutoGutterFallback(nth($gutter, 4), $sgh) * 0.5

@each $type, $value in $admonitions
    &.#{$type}
      border-left-color: var(--color-admonition-title--#{$type})
      > .admonition-title
        background-color: var(--color-admonition-title-background--#{$type})
        &::before
          background-color: var(--color-admonition-title--#{$type})
          mask-image: var(--icon-#{nth($value, 2)})

&--jump-right,
  &--jump-left,
  &--jump-up,
  &--jump-down
    &-enter-active,
    &-leave-active
      transition: opacity var(--q-transition-duration), transform var(--q-transition-duration)
    &-enter-from,
    &-leave-to
      opacity: 0

  &--jump-right
    &-enter-from
      transform: translate3d(-15px, 0, 0)
    &-leave-to
      transform: translate3d(15px, 0, 0)

@keyframes #{$name}
        from
            background: rgba(black, .2 / (1+$from/10))
            border-color: rgba(black, .2 / (1+$from/10))
            transform: translateX($from*$spacingX) translateY($from*$spacingY) translateZ(-$from)
            box-shadow: 0 0 $from/10 rgba(black, .2)
            filter: blur($from/10)
        to
            background: rgba(black, .2 / (1+$to/10))
            border-color: rgba(black, .2 / (1+$to/10))
            transform: translateX($to*$spacingX) translateY($to*$spacingY) translateZ(-$to)
            box-shadow: 0 0 $to/10 rgba(black, .2)
            filter: blur($to/10)

@keyframes #{$name}
        from
            background: rgba(black, .2 / (1+$from/10))
            border-color: rgba(black, .2 / (1+$from/10))
            transform: translateX($from*$decalX) translateY($from*$decalY) translateZ(-$from)
            box-shadow: 0 0 $from/10 rgba(black, .2)
            filter: blur($from/10)
        to
            background: rgba(black, .2 / (1+$to/10))
            border-color: rgba(black, .2 / (1+$to/10))
            transform: translateX($to*$decalX) translateY($to*$decalY) translateZ(-$to)
            box-shadow: 0 0 $to/10 rgba(black, .2)
            filter: blur($to/10)

&.nice
    background-color: $default-color
    +background-image(linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,0.2) 0%, rgba(255,255,255,0.2) 50%, rgba(0,0,0,0) 51%, rgba(0,0,0,0) 100%))
    +box-shadow(inset rgba(255,255,255,0.5) 0 1px 0)
    text-shadow: rgba(0,0,0,0.28) 0 -1px 1px
    border: 1px solid darken($default-color, 7%)
    +transition-property(background-color)
    +transition-duration($button-transition-duration)
    +transition-timing-function(ease-in-out)

&:not(.has-icon-right)
      .icon
        left: ($size-normal * 2.5) / 2
        transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%)
      .input
        padding-left: 2.5em
        &.is-small
          & + .icon
            left: ($size-small * 2.5) / 2
        &.is-medium
          & + .icon
            left: ($size-medium * 2.5) / 2
        &.is-large
          & + .icon
            left: ($size-large * 2.5) / 2

&.has-icon-right
      .icon
        right: ($size-normal * 2.5) / 2
        transform: translateX(50%) translateY(-50%)
      .input
        padding-right: 2.5em
        &.is-small
          & + .icon
            right: ($size-small * 2.5) / 2
        &.is-medium
          & + .icon
            right: ($size-medium * 2.5) / 2
        &.is-large
          & + .icon
            right: ($size-large * 2.5) / 2

&#{ $self }--clear
        background-color: transparent
        #{ $self }
          &__text, &__icon
            color: $buttonColor

        &#{ $self }--hover:hover
          border-width: 0
          background-color: transparent
        &#{ $self }--active:active
          $buttonColor: #CB0A22
          border-width: 0
          background-color: transparent
          #{ $self }
            &__text, &__icon
              color: $buttonColor

&#{ $self }--clear
        background-color: transparent
        #{ $self }
          &__text, &__icon
            color: $button-color

        &#{ $self }--hover:hover
          border-width: 0
          background-color: transparent
        &#{ $self }--active:active
          $button-color: #CB0A22
          border-width: 0
          background-color: transparent
          #{ $self }
            &__text, &__icon
              color: $button-color

margin: 0 0.2rem
  padding: 0 0.2rem
  border-radius: 0.2rem
  border: 1px solid var(--color-foreground-border)
  color: var(--color-foreground-primary)
  vertical-align: text-bottom

  font-size: var(--font-size--small--3)
  display: inline-block

  box-shadow: 0 0.0625rem 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2), inset 0 0 0 0.125rem var(--color-background-primary)

  background-color: var(--color-background-secondary)

&.q-field--dense
    .q-field__control, .q-field__native
      min-height: 36px
    .q-field__native
      padding-top: 9px

    &.q-field--labeled
      .q-field__control-container
        padding-top: 14px
      .q-field__shadow
        top: 14px
      .q-field__native
        min-height: 24px
        padding-top: 3px
      .q-field__prefix, .q-field__suffix
        padding-top: 2px

&.v-overlay__content
      &.v-speed-dial__content--end,
      &.v-speed-dial__content--end-center,
      &.v-speed-dial__content--right,
      &.v-speed-dial__content--right-center
        flex-direction: row

      &.v-speed-dial__content--left,
      &.v-speed-dial__content--left-center,
      &.v-speed-dial__content--start,
      &.v-speed-dial__content--start-center
        flex-direction: row-reverse

      &.v-speed-dial__content--top,
      &.v-speed-dial__content--top-center
        flex-direction: column-reverse

&:hover, &:focus, &.selected
          +border-radius
          +text-shadow(lighten($c, 15), 0, 1px)
          background: $c
          +linear-gradient(color-stops(lighten($c, 1), $c))
          position: relative
          z-index: 2
          padding: 3px 12px 3px 10px
          margin: 0 -4px 0 -2px
          color: desaturate(darken(#005498, 14), 20)
          border-color: lighten($c, 5) $c darken($c, 7) $c
          &:after
            color: darken($c, 22) !important
            //+text-shadow(darken($c, 22), 0, -1px)

&__detail
    +font-weight('medium')
    +font-size('sm')
    text-align: right
    word-wrap: anywhere
    +flex(row, wrap, flex-start, center)
    &--primary
      color: map-get($primary, 'primaryDark')
    &--danger
      color: map-get($danger, 'dangerBase')
    &--light
      color: map-get($grey, 'greyBase')
    &--dark
      color: map-get($grey, 'greyDark')
    &--wrap
      text-align: left

@keyframes pulse
  0%
    -webkit-transform: scale3d(1, 1, 1)
    -ms-transform: scale3d(1, 1, 1)
    transform: scale3d(1, 1, 1)

  50%
    -webkit-transform: scale3d(1.05, 1.05, 1.05)
    -ms-transform: scale3d(1.05, 1.05, 1.05)
    transform: scale3d(1.05, 1.05, 1.05)

  100%
    -webkit-transform: scale3d(1, 1, 1)
    -ms-transform: scale3d(1, 1, 1)
    transform: scale3d(1, 1, 1)

@keyframes shake
  0%, 100%
    -webkit-transform: translate3d(0, 0, 0)
    -ms-transform: translate3d(0, 0, 0)
    transform: translate3d(0, 0, 0)

  10%, 30%, 50%, 70%, 90%
    -webkit-transform: translate3d(-10px, 0, 0)
    -ms-transform: translate3d(-10px, 0, 0)
    transform: translate3d(-10px, 0, 0)

  20%, 40%, 60%, 80%
    -webkit-transform: translate3d(10px, 0, 0)
    -ms-transform: translate3d(10px, 0, 0)
    transform: translate3d(10px, 0, 0)

*:not(dl.option-list) > :not(dt):not(kbd):not(.kbd) > kbd,
  *:not(dl.option-list) > :not(dt):not(kbd):not(.kbd) > .kbd
    color: inherit
    font-size: 80%
    background-color: lighten($text-light, 30%)
    border: 1px solid darken($text-light, 5%)
    border-radius: $base-line-height / 6
    box-shadow: grey 0px $base-line-height / 12
    padding: $base-line-height / 10 $base-line-height / 4
    margin: auto 0

&:nth-child(1)
			+tile($size*2, $size, 3px, lightgrey)
			&, &::before
				border-radius: 20px 10px 10px 0
			.table-pod
				&:first-child
					transform: translateX($size*1.4) translateZ(-$size/2) rotateX(-90deg) rotateY(-90deg)
				&:nth-child(2)
					transform: translateX(-$size*.4) translateY($size*.1) translateZ(-$size/2) rotateX(-90deg) rotateY(-90deg)
				&:nth-child(3)
					transform: translateX($size*.1) translateY(-$size*.4) translateZ(-$size/2) rotateX(-90deg)

&:nth-child(1)
			+tile($size*2, $size, 3px, lightgrey)
			&, &::before
				border-radius: 20px 10px 10px 0
			.table-pod
				position: absolute
				top: 0
				&:first-child
					transform: translateX($size*1.4) translateZ(-$size/2) rotateX(-90deg) rotateY(-90deg)
				&:nth-child(2)
					transform: translateX(-$size*.4) translateY($size*.1) translateZ(-$size/2) rotateX(-90deg) rotateY(-90deg)
				&:nth-child(3)
					transform: translateX($size*.1) translateY(-$size*.4) translateZ(-$size/2) rotateX(-90deg)
